creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Maintainer/Submitter:
Have you considered version 2.0.1?
<http://pecl.php.net/package/memcached>

2.0.0 has been tested against php5.4 (see change log above)

2.0.1 is renamed !dev (stable, released)

Wouldn't this be better than this patch against 1.0.2?  adding a files/patch__ that will need to be removed soon anyway?
(moved LICENSE to make portlint -abt happy, use RUN_DEPENDS:= on initial assignment as is best practices now)


-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
SECNAP Network Security Corporation
http://people.freebsd.org/~scheidell
